creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Thu Dec 12 15:57:56 2013
New Revision: 336273
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/336273

Log:
  devel/rubygem-deep_merge: Recursive hash merger
  
  This is a deep_merge Ruby Gem that is used to recursively merge hashes,
  working with Ruby 1.9 and ActiveSupport.
  
  WWW: http://rubygems.org/gems/deep_merge
  
  PR:		ports/184722
  Submitted by:	Bartek Rutkowski <ports robakdesign.com>

Added:
  head/devel/rubygem-deep_merge/
  head/devel/rubygem-deep_merge/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/rubygem-deep_merge/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/rubygem-deep_merge/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/devel/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/Makefile	Thu Dec 12 15:50:55 2013	(r336272)
+++ head/devel/Makefile	Thu Dec 12 15:57:56 2013	(r336273)
@@ -4115,6 +4115,7 @@
     SUBDIR += rubygem-debugger
     SUBDIR += rubygem-debugger-linecache
     SUBDIR += rubygem-debugger-xml
+    SUBDIR += rubygem-deep_merge
     SUBDIR += rubygem-deeptest
     SUBDIR += rubygem-delayed_job
     SUBDIR += rubygem-dep_selector

Added: head/devel/rubygem-deep_merge/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/rubygem-deep_merge/Makefile	Thu Dec 12 15:57:56 2013	(r336273)
@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	deep_merge
+PORTVERSION=	1.0.0
+CATEGORIES=	devel rubygems
+MASTER_SITES=	RG
+
+MAINTAINER=	ports@robakdesign.com
+COMMENT=	Recursive hash merger
+
+LICENSE=	MIT
+
+USE_RUBY=	yes
+USE_RUBYGEMS=	yes
+RUBYGEM_AUTOPLIST=	yes
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/devel/rubygem-deep_merge/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/rubygem-deep_merge/distinfo	Thu Dec 12 15:57:56 2013	(r336273)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (rubygem/deep_merge-1.0.0.gem) = b32a0ad0b4d458509f39d38222e342f8c91a1cbaf5ff6baa56fb16d15d5f6264
+SIZE (rubygem/deep_merge-1.0.0.gem) = 11776

Added: head/devel/rubygem-deep_merge/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/rubygem-deep_merge/pkg-descr	Thu Dec 12 15:57:56 2013	(r336273)
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+This is a deep_merge Ruby Gem that is used to recursively merge hashes,
+working with Ruby 1.9 and ActiveSupport.
+
+WWW: http://rubygems.org/gems/deep_merge
